Notice Of Motion To Seal Private Information In Complaint Exhibit A
Off Calendar Aug-20-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF HELEN SHIH's Motion To Seal Private Information In Complaint Exhibit A.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Helen Shih's unopposed "motion to seal private information to complaint exhibit A" is granted.

Order signed.
